content:
Methods of Learning Foregin Languages Having decent learning materials is definitely one of the most important, and also the first thing first to do when you start learning a new language,
But be wary of becoming one of those people who collects language learning material, though. Once you’ve worked your way through one complete grammar book,
It’s time to try your wings rather than going back to the beginning.
And learning languages is not just about “remembering” all the time though its crucial to build your own vocabulary.
While most people don’t do learning by going through grammar books, I find that using a good grammar book together with learning phrases and vocabulary really
Puts things into proper perspective. There will be details that are over your head. Skip those things until they become relevant to what you are learning or
have learned and focus on those things that are currently relevant.
Italian “Ciao” This is what I use for my textbook.
“Litaliano secondo il metodo natura” This book uses Natural-learning method so that learners could absord the language itself before having any background knowledge about it.
Me personally love this method a lot and I’ll definitely recommend others to try it!:)
“Modern Italian Grammar - A Practical Guide” A complete guide for grammars that you must know.
“Assimil italian with ease” A great book to support your study.
Assimil series are always best-known for their way of teaching European language though they’re expensive.
German “Deutsch Nach Der Naturmethode” Natural-learning method for German
“Deutsche Sprachlehre Fur Ausländer” My first textbook for German.
“Modern GERMAN Grammar” A complete guide for grammars that you must know.
Latin “A Primer of Ecclesiastical Latin” I use it as my workbook, and the questions in it are quite interesting!
“Learn to Read Latin” It’s the best and the most detailed text book that I’ve ever found.
After finishing this book, you would have the ability to read most of the Latin works by yourself.
“Lingua Latina per se Illustrata” Natural Learning method for Latin.
Tools Language Transfer I don’t know if this works well since I barely have time to check it out!
But many people have recommened this; therefore, I believe it helps more or less
ItalianPod Archive Wonderful material for Italian listening practice.
title: Methods of Learning Foregin Languages and My Materials

content:
Exploring Europe with my friends this Summer!
Here are some pictures taken from the workshop ‘Objects of the Mundane’ in collaboration with Universidad Europea and Nagami in Spain.
It’s such a great fun to see all the outcomes from these groups! Wishing that we all have the chance to see the final piece that were collected by museum in the future!
Above is a project looking at communication between machines, human and the ‘controlled errors’ occurred in miscommunication, Trying to create a catalogue that opens up a new way of design.
Above is a project exploring what ‘private’ spaces means, Deconstructing the ideas of privacy and intimacy of urban realm.
title: 'Objects of Mundane' Workshop '22
